---
title: "Ashutosh Bajpai"
image: images/ashutosh.jpg
comments: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ashutosh.bajpai00007@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashutosh-bajpai-devops/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ashutoshbajpai007
      target: _blank
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/YOUR_TWITTER_HANDLE
      target: _blank
---

::: {#hero-heading}

## Hello! 👋

I am Ashutosh Bajpai, a passionate technologist and lifelong learner. I enjoy exploring new technologies, building innovative solutions, and sharing my knowledge with the community through writing and open-source contributions.

### Professional Experience

[Add your professional experience here - describe your current role, previous positions, and areas of expertise]

### What You'll Find Here

- [Technical Blog](blog.html) - My thoughts on technology, software development, and innovation
- Personal interests and projects

### Let's Connect

I'm always interested in connecting with fellow technologists and collaborating on interesting projects. Feel free to reach out via any of the links above.

:::
